args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts

- Main exports or names: Factory helper for creating Hono applications with custom error handling, logging, validation, and context extensions.
- Reads as: TypeScript module with inline factory function and helper utilities.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/route, src/helper/websocket, src/helper/cookie.
- Safe summary: Provides a centralized factory pattern for app initialization with configurable middleware chains.

## src/helper/route/index.ts

- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath.
- Reads as: Route inspection utilities that extract routing information from context.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory, src/helper/websocket, src/helper/cookie.
- Safe summary: Returns matched route data including handler paths, parameters, and nested route hierarchy.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts

- Main exports or names: WSContext, defineWebSocketHelper, WSEvents, WSReadyState, UpgradeWebSocket.
- Reads as: WebSocket upgrade handler with event-driven handler pattern and context object.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory, src/helper/route, src/helper/cookie.
- Safe summary: Enables WebSocket connections with clean event handling (onOpen, onMessage, onClose, onError).

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts

- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie.
- Reads as: Cookie management with signed support using server-side secret.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory, src/helper/route, src/helper/websocket.
- Safe summary: Handles cookie reading/writing with __Secure- and __Host- prefixes and signed storage.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts

- Main exports or names: testClient.
- Reads as: Testing client generator that creates client-side API calls for testing servers.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter, src/helper/testing/client.
- Safe summary: Creates a testable client instance for calling server routes in unit tests.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts

- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents, Runtime type.
- Reads as: Runtime detection for node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, and edge-light environments.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/edge, src/helper/testing.
- Safe summary: Detects execution runtime and provides access to platform-specific environment bindings.

## src/helper/css/index.ts

- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext.
- Reads as: Experimental CSS-in-JS helper with class-name slug generation and server-side rendering.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common, src/helper/html, src/helper/jsx/dom/css.
- Safe summary: Provides styled components with automatic class names and scoped styles.

## src/helper/css/common.ts

- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString.
- Reads as: Utility functions for CSS helper with class tracking and style merging.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index, src/helper/html, src/helper/jsx/dom.
- Safe summary: Shared CSS logic including symbol keys and helper functions for class/selector manipulation.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts

- Main exports or names: proxy, hopByHopHeaders, ALLOWED_TOKEN_PATTERN.
- Reads as: HTTP proxy fetch wrapper with RFC 9110 header compliance options.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory, src/helper/adapter, src/utils/headers.
- Safe summary: Fetches remote URLs with automatic hop-by-hop header cleanup and security options.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts

- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName.
- Reads as: Development utilities for inspecting registered routes and handlers.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory, src/router, src/utils/handler.
- Safe summary: Prints route listing with method, path, and handler name in console.

## src/helper/html/index.ts

- Main exports or names: html, raw.
- Reads as: Template string HTML helper with auto-escaping and callback support.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index, src/utils/html, src/helper/jsx.
- Safe summary: Creates HTML strings with XSS protection via escapeToBuffer and callback rendering.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts

- Main exports or names: ssg, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY.
- Reads as: Static Site Generation support with params middleware and plugins.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg, src/helper/ssg/utils, src/helper/ssg/middleware.
- Safe summary: Enables pre-rendering static pages from server-side routes.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts

- Main exports or names: generateStatic, generateStaticParams.
- Reads as: Core SSG logic that fetches routes, serializes HTML, and writes files.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index, src/helper/ssg/utils, src/helper/ssg/middleware.
- Safe summary: Traverses routes and generates static HTML files in configured output directory.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts

- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir.
- Reads as: Path manipulation utilities for SSG output handling.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index, src/helper/ssg/ssg, src/utils/handler.
- Safe summary: Joins path segments, filters static routes, and prevents path traversal attacks.

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts

- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, SSG_DISABLED_RESPONSE.
- Reads as: SSG middleware for injecting generation params and controlling generation context.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index, src/helper/ssg/utils, src/helper/ssg/ssg.
- Safe summary: Middleware that marks requests for SSG generation and handles dynamic route params.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts

- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage.
- Reads as: Streaming response helpers for chunked data delivery.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/sse, src/helper/streaming/text.
- Safe summary: Provides streaming responses for large data and Server-Sent Events.

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts

- Main exports or names: stream.
- Reads as: Generic streaming helper with TransformStream and context stashing for Bun compatibility.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index, src/helper/streaming/sse, src/helper/streaming/text, src/utils/stream.
- Safe summary: Wraps a callback to process data through a streaming API.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts

- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage.
- Reads as: Server-Sent Events streaming with Event, ID, retry support.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index, src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/text.
- Safe summary: Creates SSE connection with proper headers and event formatting.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts

- Main exports or names: streamText.
- Reads as: Plain text streaming with Content-Type set to text/plain.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index, src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/sse.
- Safe summary: Streams text output with nosniff security header.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts

- Main exports or names: accepts.
- Reads as: Accept header parsing for content negotiation.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts, src/utils/accept, src/utils/headers.
- Safe summary: Matches Accept headers to preferred language, charset, or content type.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts

- Main exports or names: accepts, defaultMatch, Accept interface, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions.
- Reads as: Accept header parser with q-value sorting and match configuration.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/index, src/utils/accept, src/helper/conninfo.
- Safe summary: Extracts best match from Accept header using quality values.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts

- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType, GetConnInfo.
- Reads as: Connection info types for remote address and transport details.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types, src/context, src/utils/conninfo.
- Safe summary: Provides type definitions for client connection metadata access.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts

- Main exports or names: AddressType, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo, GetConnInfo.
- Reads as: Type definitions for connection info including IPv6/IPv4 and port/address.
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index, src/context, src/utils/conninfo.
- Safe summary: Declares interfaces for remote address info and connection details.

## Simple Index

- [ ] src/helper/route/index.ts
- [ ] src/helper/websocket/index.ts

- [ ] src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- [ ] src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- [ ] src/helper/streaming/index.ts
